ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market value of the company's outstanding shares */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Annual dividend per share divided by the share price */,
  "beta" TEXT /* Measure of the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "fifty_two_week_high" TEXT /* Highest price the stock has reached in the past 52 weeks */,
  "fifty_two_week_low" TEXT /* Lowest price the stock has reached in the past 52 weeks */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "trade_amount" INTEGER /* Total trade amount in the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Closing price adjusted for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividends paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "trade_amount" INTEGER /* Total trade amount in the stock */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest price a buyer is willing to pay for the stock */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest price a seller is willing to accept for the stock */,
  "bid_volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares at the bid price */,
  "ask_volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares at the ask price */,
  "last_trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the last trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for communication */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's physical address */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of residence */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user has enabled two-factor authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was last updated */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the portfolio (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "portfolio_type" TEXT /* Type of portfolio (e.g., conservative, balanced, aggressive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock in a portfolio */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "profit_loss" TEXT /* Profit or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock data in the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily summary, trend analysis) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's preferred time zone */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user's notification preferences */,
  "session_expiry" INTEGER /* Duration after which the user session expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
